privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Nuxeo Platform 10.10 instance running in Docker with PostgreSQL 11. The target user 'jsmith' is created during environment setup with initial properties: firstName='John', email='jsmith@acmecorp.com', company='Acme Corp', groups=['members']. The task requires updating these properties to: firstName='Jonathan', email='jonathan.smith@newcorp-intl.com', company='NewCorp International', groups=['members', 'powerusers']. All metadata claims are verified against the task description and implementation scripts. The verifier confirms success when all four properties match expected values (50 points minimum threshold from 100 maximum). User data is fetched from Nuxeo REST API /user/jsmith endpoint and exported to /tmp/task_result.json for verification. Document PDFs are real PDF files (valid format) included in the environment data directory.
